title: gal #1530
definition:
1) heap, spring, wave, billow
    1a) heap (of stones)
        1a1) over dead body
        1a2) alone
        1a3) used in ratifying a covenant
    1b) waves (fig. of chastisement of Jehovah)
    1c) spring
nasbUsage:

        1a1) over dead body
        1a2) alone

    NASB:  a heap, wave, billow
